title: Junior Investment Banker at NSDL Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at NSDL Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
NSDL Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Coimbatore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NSDL Asia Pacific Associates:
NSDL Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDL Asia Pacific Associates!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
